visits.title: 2026 - Interview Simulation with Yves Schlüter
details: External guest Yves Schlüter, a former Post Luxembourg employee, visited our class
Conducted a mock job interview simulation and reviewed our cover letters and CVs
Received personalized feedback on improving the layout and presentation of the CV
Learned how to confidently answer critical and challenging interview questions

visits.title: 2025/26 - CV & Interview Preparation with Guy Marong
details: External guest Guy Marong accompanied our class throughout the entire first semester
Guided us on how to properly structure an English CV
Taught techniques for preparing and presenting oneself in a professional job interview

visits.title: 2025 - Interview Simulation with NTT Luxembourg
details: Applied CV and interview skills from Guy Marong's sessions in a real-world mock interview with NTT Luxembourg
Gained practical experience in a professional interview setting with an actual company

visits.title: 2026 - Luxembourg Army Visit
details: Scheduled military facility tour
Exploration of military technology and infrastructure

visits.title: 2026 - LuxConnect Visit
details: Data center facility tour and inspection
Learned about data center infrastructure and operations

visits.title: 2026 - House of Entrepreneurship - Online Course
details: Completed online course on business creation and entrepreneurship
Learned fundamentals of starting and managing a company

visits.title: 2026 - ARHS Group Visit – AWS re:Invent re:cap
details: Attended AWS re:Invent re:cap event: "From Las Vegas to Belval"
Overview of the latest AWS announcements and innovations from re:Invent
Insights into cloud computing trends and AWS services

visits.title: 2025 - Microsoft Official Training – AZ-900
details: External trainer Xavier Nix from Deep visited our class for two full days of in-person instruction
Course: AZ-900 Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
Covered core cloud concepts, Azure services, and pricing
